Title: Non-canonical RNA-directed DNA methylation participates in maternal and environmental control of seed dormancy

Common_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite: Seed dormancy state via ALN-controlled purine catabolism context
Common_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Class: Physiological trait linked to nitrogen/purine metabolism
Common_Genes.Epigenetic_Regulation: Part of canonical RdDM, but ALN imprinting and cold-induced POGO methylation are largely Pol IV-independent
Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Not required for ALN paternal allele silencing or cold-induced POGO CHH methylation, but nrpd1 seeds still show reduced dormancy, suggesting a separate positive role of Pol IV in dormancy
Common_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Mutant crosses; bisulfite sequencing; allele-specific RT-PCR; qRT-PCR; dormancy assays
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. NRPD1 is dispensable for ALN imprinting and for cold-induced CHH methylation at the ALN upstream POGO region. 2. Despite this, nrpd1 seeds have reduced dormancy, indicating Pol IV promotes dormancy through another pathway. 3. This distinction helped define ALN control as non-canonical rather than canonical RdDM.
Common_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Limited direct value for ALN-specific dormancy engineering due to broad functions and locus-extrinsic effects.
Common_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Included as a core comparison gene because it was directly tested in Results and was central to distinguishing canonical from non-canonical RdDM.

Common_Genes.Source_Species_Variety: Ler-derived mutant background in double mutant; Col-0 single mutant
Common_Genes.Protein_Family_or_Domain: ARGONAUTE family; PAZ and PIWI domains
Common_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite: Seed dormancy state via ALN-controlled purine catabolism context
Common_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Class: Physiological trait linked to nitrogen/purine metabolism
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: More ubiquitous than AGO6; expression increased in seeds developing at 10°C
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: qRT-PCR showed increased transcript in cold-developed seeds
Common_Genes.Epigenetic_Regulation: Participates in ALN POGO methylation in combination with AGO6 for imprinting, but not essential alone for cold-induced methylation increase
Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: ago4 alone modestly affects basal methylation but cold-developed ago4 seeds still increase dormancy similarly to WT; ago4ago6 double mutants lose paternal ALN silencing
Common_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Single- and double-mutant analysis; bisulfite sequencing; allele-specific RT-PCR; qRT-PCR; dormancy assays
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. AGO4 contributes to basal methylation at the ALN POGO region. 2. AGO4 is not required for the cold-induced methylation increase or cold-enhanced dormancy on its own. 3. Together with AGO6, AGO4 contributes to ALN paternal allele silencing.
Common_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Probably not ideal as target because single-gene effects on cold-induced dormancy are limited and broader RdDM roles are expected.
Common_Genes.Other_Important_Info: AGO4 acts additively with AGO6 in double mutants for methylation loss.

Common_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite: Seed dormancy state via ALN-controlled purine catabolism context
Common_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Class: Physiological trait linked to nitrogen/purine metabolism
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: More ubiquitous than AGO6; not significantly changed by cold
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: qRT-PCR showed no significant cold induction
Common_Genes.Epigenetic_Regulation: Contributes to basal CHH methylation at ALN POGO region and imprinting in combination with RDR6, but is not required for cold-induced methylation increase
Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: rdr2 alone has reduced methylation contribution but cold-developed rdr2 seeds increase dormancy like WT; rdr2rdr6 double mutants lose ALN imprinting
Common_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Single- and double-mutant analysis; bisulfite sequencing; allele-specific RT-PCR; qRT-PCR; dormancy assays
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. RDR2 contributes to basal ALN promoter methylation. 2. RDR2 is dispensable for the cold-induced CHH methylation increase and for cold-enhanced dormancy by itself. 3. Together with RDR6, RDR2 helps maintain ALN paternal allele silencing.
Common_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Limited direct utility due to redundancy and broad RNA silencing functions.
Common_Genes.Potential_Tradeoffs: Likely pleiotropic effects on epigenetic regulation.
Common_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Its dispensability for cold induction helped separate canonical-like components from the RDR6-AGO6-specific branch.

Pathway_Genes.Protein_Family_or_Domain: Allantoinase; amidohydrolase involved in purine catabolism
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Hydrolyzes allantoin to allantoate in purine catabolism
Pathway_Genes.End_Product_Connection_Type: Negative regulatory enzyme affecting dormancy via its expression level rather than accumulation of a nutritional metabolite
Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Associated with seed physiological state and dormancy control
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: Expressed in seed endosperm upon imbibition; lower after seed development under cold
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Endosperm of imbibed seeds; paternal allele suppressed; expression higher in warm-developed seeds and lower in cold-developed seeds
Pathway_Genes.Epigenetic_Regulation: Promoter/5' upstream POGO-region CHH methylation via non-canonical RdDM represses expression; paternal allele shows higher CHH methylation; imprinting lost in drm1drm2, nrpe1, rdr2rdr6, ago4ago6 backgrounds; cold increases CHH methylation and repression
Pathway_Genes.Applied_Promoters: Native ALN promoter fragments pALN-1525 and pALN-845 tested with GUS; 35S used for ALN overexpression
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Higher ALN expression reduces seed dormancy; repression of ALN promotes higher dormancy
Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Allele-specific RT-PCR/Sanger sequencing; qRT-PCR; promoter-GUS deletion analysis; overexpression; genetic interaction with RdDM mutants; RNAi-induced methylation of promoter region; dormancy/germination assays
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. ALN is the direct focal gene whose paternal allele is silenced in endosperm by non-canonical RdDM-dependent CHH methylation in the upstream POGO region. 2. Cold during seed development increases CHH methylation of the ALN promoter region, suppresses ALN expression upon imbibition, and increases dormancy. 3. Artificially increasing methylation of the POGO region suppresses ALN and elevates dormancy, whereas ALN overexpression lowers dormancy.
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Editing or epigenetically tuning the ALN upstream POGO region or ALN expression could modulate seed dormancy for crop establishment and pre-harvest sprouting control, but deployment requires caution because excessive dormancy may hinder uniform germination.
Pathway_Genes.Potential_Tradeoffs: High ALN expression lowers dormancy; excessive repression may cause overly persistent dormancy and poor germination synchrony.
Pathway_Genes.Omics_Data: Previously published DNA methylome datasets used for gametes/companion cells: GEO GSE40501; GSE38935; GSE89789
Pathway_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Although ALN is an enzyme gene, this paper focuses on epigenetic regulation of ALN expression and dormancy rather than direct quantification of purine metabolite pools.

Regulation_Genes.Source_Species_Variety: Col-0/C24-derived mutant background; reporter in Arabidopsis
Regulation_Genes.Protein_Family_or_Domain: ARGONAUTE family; PAZ and PIWI domains
Regulation_Genes.Metabolic_Process_Controlled: Epigenetic repression of ALN transcription controlling seed dormancy
Regulation_Genes.Primary_Regulatory_Targets: ALN upstream POGO region CHH methylation; ALN expression
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: Promotes CHH methylation at ALN promoter POGO region and represses ALN expression
Regulation_Genes.Upstream_Signals_or_Inputs: Cold during seed development; tissue-specific reproductive/seed expression
Regulation_Genes.Protein_Complex_Involvement: Functions within non-canonical RdDM machinery with RDR6 and DRM/Pol V components; genetic interaction with AGO4
Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: Expressed in shoot apex, mature pollen and developing seeds; cold-induced in pre-fertilization ovules, stamens and developing seeds
Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: AGO6-GFP detected in pre-fertilization ovules and developing seeds; fluorescence strongly increased at 10°C
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Condition-dependent controller required for cold-induced promoter methylation and consequent dormancy increase
Regulation_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite: Seed dormancy state via ALN-controlled purine catabolism context
Regulation_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Class: Physiological trait linked to nitrogen/purine metabolism
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Loss of AGO6 reduces CHH methylation of ALN upstream region, elevates ALN expression under cold-associated conditions, and decreases cold-induced seed dormancy
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Mutant analysis; double-mutant analysis (ago4ago6); bisulfite sequencing; allele-specific expression; qRT-PCR; pAGO6:AGO6-GFP imaging; dormancy assays
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. AGO6 is required for non-canonical RdDM at the ALN upstream POGO region. 2. Cold stimulates AGO6 transcript/protein accumulation in reproductive tissues and developing seeds. 3. AGO6 is necessary for cold-induced CHH methylation, ALN repression, and enhanced seed dormancy.
Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Manipulating AGO6 activity or its tissue-specific expression could tune environmentally responsive seed dormancy, though broad epigenetic effects may limit precision.
Regulation_Genes.Potential_Tradeoffs: Likely pleiotropic because AGO6 participates in broader RdDM and transposon silencing.
Regulation_Genes.Omics_Data: Expression supported by published microarray context; gamete methylome context from GEO GSE40501; GSE38935; GSE89789
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: AGO6, but not AGO4, was specifically required for cold-induced methylation increase, indicating a non-canonical and tissue-specific RdDM branch.

Regulation_Genes.Regulator_Type: RNA-dependent RNA polymerase in non-canonical RdDM
Regulation_Genes.Metabolic_Process_Controlled: Epigenetic repression of ALN transcription controlling seed dormancy
Regulation_Genes.Regulation_Mode: Generates dsRNA/siRNA precursor for non-canonical RdDM-mediated transcriptional repression
Regulation_Genes.Primary_Regulatory_Targets: ALN upstream POGO region CHH methylation; ALN expression
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: Promotes CHH methylation at the ALN promoter POGO region and thereby represses ALN
Regulation_Genes.Upstream_Signals_or_Inputs: Cold-responsive process during seed development, although RDR6 transcript abundance itself was not significantly changed by cold
Regulation_Genes.Protein_Complex_Involvement: Functions with AGO6 and DRM/Pol V components in non-canonical RdDM
Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: More ubiquitous than AGO6; detectable in reproductive tissues and seeds; not significantly induced by cold
Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: RDR6-GFP observed in ovule/seed tissues; transcript not significantly changed by cold
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Essential component of the cold-responsive non-canonical RdDM branch acting on ALN
Regulation_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite: Seed dormancy state via ALN-controlled purine catabolism context
Regulation_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Class: Physiological trait linked to nitrogen/purine metabolism
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Loss of RDR6 reduces basal and cold-induced CHH methylation at the ALN upstream region and diminishes cold-enhanced seed dormancy
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Mutant analysis; double-mutant analysis (rdr2rdr6); bisulfite sequencing; allele-specific expression; pRDR6:RDR6-GFP imaging; qRT-PCR; dormancy assays
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. RDR6 participates in non-canonical RdDM targeting the ALN upstream POGO region. 2. RDR6 is specifically required for cold-induced CHH methylation of this region. 3. RDR6-dependent methylation represses ALN and promotes seed dormancy under cold seed maturation conditions.
Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Could be targeted to alter environmentally induced dormancy, but manipulation may broadly affect siRNA pathways and create pleiotropy.
Regulation_Genes.Potential_Tradeoffs: Broad effects on RNA silencing and developmental processes likely.
Regulation_Genes.Omics_Data: Gamete methylome context from GEO GSE40501; GSE38935; GSE89789
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: RDR6 requirement distinguishes this locus from canonical Pol IV-dependent RdDM.

Regulation_Genes.Protein_Family_or_Domain: Plant-specific RNA polymerase V catalytic subunit
Regulation_Genes.Metabolic_Process_Controlled: RdDM-dependent transcriptional repression of ALN affecting seed dormancy
Regulation_Genes.Regulation_Mode: Scaffold transcription in RdDM enabling DNA methylation and transcriptional silencing
Regulation_Genes.Primary_Regulatory_Targets: ALN upstream POGO region CHH methylation; ALN expression
Regulation_Genes.Protein_Complex_Involvement: RdDM machinery with DRM methyltransferases and AGO proteins
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Required core RdDM component for ALN imprinting and cold-responsive repression
Regulation_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite: Seed dormancy state via ALN-controlled purine catabolism context
Regulation_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Class: Physiological trait linked to nitrogen/purine metabolism
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: nrpe1 reduces CHH methylation at the ALN upstream region, disrupts paternal ALN silencing, and lowers cold-induced dormancy
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Mutant crosses; bisulfite sequencing; allele-specific RT-PCR; dormancy assays
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. NRPE1 is required for CHH methylation of the ALN promoter POGO region. 2. Loss of NRPE1 disrupts ALN imprinting and cold-induced repression. 3. NRPE1 contributes to high dormancy in cold-developed seeds.
Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential entry point to alter epigenetic dormancy control, but very high pleiotropic risk due to global RdDM functions.
Regulation_Genes.Potential_Tradeoffs: Broad genome-wide epigenetic and transposon-silencing effects likely.
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Although Pol IV/NRPD1 was dispensable for POGO methylation increase, Pol V/NRPE1 remained essential, defining non-canonical RdDM.

Regulation_Genes.Applied_Species_Variety: Ws; hybrid seeds with Cvi maternal parent
Regulation_Genes.Metabolic_Process_Controlled: DNA methylation-mediated repression of ALN controlling seed dormancy
Regulation_Genes.Regulation_Mode: De novo CHH methylation in RdDM
Regulation_Genes.Primary_Regulatory_Targets: ALN upstream POGO region; paternal ALN allele expression
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: Establish/promote CHH methylation leading to ALN repression
Regulation_Genes.Upstream_Signals_or_Inputs: Non-canonical RdDM pathway; cold during seed development
Regulation_Genes.Protein_Complex_Involvement: RdDM effector methyltransferases downstream of AGO/Pol V
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Essential methyltransferase step required both for imprinting and cold-induced methylation at ALN
Regulation_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite: Seed dormancy state via ALN-controlled purine catabolism context
Regulation_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Class: Physiological trait linked to nitrogen/purine metabolism
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: drm1drm2 abolishes ALN paternal silencing, prevents cold-induced methylation increase, maintains higher ALN expression, and reduces dormancy
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Mutant analysis; reciprocal crosses; bisulfite sequencing; qRT-PCR; dormancy assays; genetic interaction with aln
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. DRM1/DRM2 are required for ALN imprinting through promoter-region CHH methylation. 2. They are necessary for cold-induced methylation increase at the ALN upstream POGO region. 3. Loss of DRM1/2 lowers seed dormancy, and this phenotype is suppressed by aln mutation.
Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Useful mechanistically but less suitable as breeding targets because of strong global methylation pleiotropy.
Regulation_Genes.Potential_Tradeoffs: Severe off-target epigenetic effects expected across the genome.
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: aln drm1 drm2 and aln drm1 drm2 cmt3 seeds recovered high dormancy, indicating ALN acts downstream of drm dormancy phenotypes in this context.
